title: Aurora, 33889, Palm Pals Dart Dragonfly 5In, Soft Toy, Blue
features: Let's meet the Palm Pals Dart Dragonfly Soft Toy, 5in, from Aurora's popular Palm Pals Collection. This adorable dragonfly plush is blue and silver in colour, and filled with beans. It fits perfectly into your palm, making it great for small cuddling, and it makes a wonderful gift for any occasion

The Dart Dragonfly is part of the Palm Pals Critters collection. The Palm Pals range includes collections such as Craving, Pets, Craving, Zoo, Aquatic, and many more. These plushies are all super gorgeous and irresistibly cute.

Palm Pals are cute, touchable soft toys made with high-quality materials. They are part of our Eco-Friendly initiative, featuring inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic. Our hangtags are recyclable, and our cloth labels are made from recycled materials.

Suitable from birth, the Palm Pals Dart Dragonfly measures 13cm. Dart jumps at lightspeed from interest to interest, trying new hobbies, sports, classes, languages, and everything in between. If you’re ever nervous about trying something new, Dart is just the dragonfly to bring with you! This adventurous Dart Dragonfly will surely win everyone's hearts!

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful plush and experience the joy of this beloved Palm Pals.
